content.text:
The search results are conclusive. The "Syncopation" world tour at Kai Tak Stadium, Hong Kong on June 27–28, 2026 belongs to **i-dle (formerly (G)I-DLE)**, not aespa. The venue official page (kaitaksportspark.com.hk) and Koreaboo both confirm this clearly. The candidate's raw title even reads "i-dle World Tour Syncopation 2026 – Hong Kong," but the artist field was incorrectly listed as aespa.
